name: salesforce
description: Manage accounts, contacts, opportunities, and leads in your Salesforce CRM

envVars.name: SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Salesforce OAuth Consumer Key (from your Connected App)

tools.name: List Accounts
tools.description: List accounts from your Salesforce CRM

tools.name: Get Account
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific account

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List contacts from your Salesforce CRM

tools.name: List Opportunities
tools.description: List sales opportunities from your Salesforce CRM

tools.name: Create Lead
tools.description: Create a new lead in Salesforce CRM

prompts.title: Find accounts
prompts.prompt: Search for accounts in my Salesforce CRM and show me their key information.

prompts.title: Create a lead
prompts.prompt: Create a new lead in Salesforce CRM with the information I provide.

prompts.title: Pipeline summary
prompts.prompt: Show me a summary of my current sales opportunities and pipeline status.

prompts.title: Contact lookup
prompts.prompt: Find and display information about specific contacts in my Salesforce CRM.
